title: Outlet Sales Manager
description:
Position: Outlet Sales Manager

Salary: SGD3,000 – SGD4,000 per month (Basic, excluding commissions & incentives)


About De Beaute:

High-End established brand in Beauty, Slimming & TCM Wellness Spa.
De Beaute is a high-end, established name in Singapore’s beauty and spa wellness industry, case-trusted and approved, renowned for delivering exceptional services and customer satisfaction. Join our passionate team and be part of an award-winning brand that sets the standard in beauty and wellness.


Key Responsibilities:

- Lead, motivate, and manage the sales team to achieve monthly and annual sales targets

- Develop and implement effective sales strategies and in-house promotions

- Build and maintain strong relationships with new and existing clients

- Provide professional consultation and excellent customer service on De Beaute’s range of beauty and wellness services

- Conduct training, coaching, and performance evaluations for the sales team

- Analyze sales data, monitor KPIs, and prepare regular performance reports for management review

- Collaborate closely with marketing and operations teams to ensure successful campaign execution and customer engagement

Requirements:

- Proven experience with a track record in sales as a Sales Manager or similar role, preferably in the beauty, slimming, spa, wellness, or retail industry

- Strong leadership, people management, and team-building skills

- Excellent communication, interpersonal, and presentation abilities

- Results-driven, self-motivated, and able to work independently in a fast-paced environment

- Good knowledge of beauty and wellness products/services is a strong advantage

- Ability to analyze data and make strategic decisions

Benefits:

-Sundays and Public Holidays off.

- Attractive basic salary with high commissions and incentives

- Career advancement and professional development opportunities

- Staff discounts on all beauty and spa services

- Supportive, dynamic, and collaborative team environment

- Recognition and rewards for outstanding performance


Working Hours:
Mon - Fri : 10.30am to 8pm
Sat : 10 am - 6pm
Closed on Sun & PH


Interested candidates, please contact us via WhatsApp at 8133 3030. Initial interview will be conducted via video call, followed by an in-person office interview.

postedCompany.description:
DE BEAUTE BEAUTY & SLIMMING PTE. LTD.

 

De Beaute has been established since September 2001. De Beaute aims to provide Beauty and Wellness services and solutions to pamper the modern women today. Our services are all designed and tailored for all women of all levels of professionalism, such that we could assist our prestigious customers in achieving the body they deserve, in the most effective and efficient manner. Within less than 3 years of operations, we already have 4 operating outlets located out at various parts of Singapore for our customers' convenience.

The teams behind De Beaute are all experienced Beauty Professional who hold International Beauty Certifications and had global exposures in countries such as United States of America, Spain and Hong Kong. They attend various International Beauty Exhibitions and Seminars, thus providing them with the opportunities to review most of the latest beauty treatment products and equipments first hand.
postedCompany.name: DE BEAUTE BEAUTY & SLIMMING PTE. LTD.
